title: pertya monocephala
intro: Pertya monocephala is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pertya monocephala include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Pertya monocephala can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
